title: Ender Paper
description: Crafted with paper and an ender pearl, the Ender Paper can be renamed after a mob or player, allowing you to teleport by right-clicking. It has 64 uses.
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/CzIDDroEMS0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>The Ender Paper is a versatile item crafted from paper and an ender pearl. When renamed after a mob or player, it lets you instantly teleport to the target by right-clicking. Each Ender Paper has 64 uses, making it perfect for exploring, escaping danger, or traveling long distances without portals. Its ease of use and precision make it an essential tool for adventurers and collectors alike.
